metadata.name: Advise on Record-Keeping for Schedule C

description: A new freelancer asks for advice on what records they need to keep for their business expenses.

nodes.task_description: Identify the client's type of business (freelance writing).

expected_outcome.value: Agent understands the nature of the client's business.

nodes.task_description: Provide a list of common deductible expenses for their industry (e.g., home office, internet, software, supplies).

expected_outcome.value: Agent gives a relevant list of potential deductions.

nodes.task_description: Explain the documentation requirements for each type of expense (e.g., receipts, logs, bank statements).

expected_outcome.value: Agent provides clear and actionable advice on how to properly document expenses to withstand an audit.
